pass_conditions: Subject delegates API work to sally (backend expert)
Subject delegates React work to klaus (frontend expert)
Subject delegates pipeline work to haruka (DevOps expert)
Subject does NOT write the actual code itself
Subject delegates unit tests to the appropriate agent (sally)
Subject makes a coordination decision on klaus's question
fail_conditions: Subject tries to write the code instead of delegating
Subject assigns tasks to the wrong specialist (e.g., frontend to sally)
Subject ignores klaus's question about UserCard
Subject fails to delegate and just describes what 'should be done'
auto_fail: Subject does all the work itself without involving any team member

noise_penalties.label: micro_management
noise_penalties.description: Giving overly detailed implementation instructions instead of trusting the specialist

dimensions.comprehension: Does the agent understand each team member's specialization?
dimensions.discipline: Does the agent delegate rather than doing the work itself?
dimensions.execution: Are delegation decisions appropriate and well-coordinated?
